hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'playwright/typescript'; then ROOT=$(git -C "$(dirname "$FILE")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && cd "$ROOT/playwright/typescript" && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run format; fi; true

INPUT=$(cat); TARGET=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.path // .tool_response.path // empty'); if [ -n "$TARGET" ] && [ -d "$TARGET" ]; then ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && "$ROOT/scripts/provision-worktree-env.sh" "$TARGET" || true; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Provisioning env files for the new worktree...

hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+worktree[[:space:]]+add[[:space:]]'; then TARGET=$(echo "$CMD" | awk '{a=0;s=0;for(i=1;i<=NF;i++){if($i=="add"){a=1;continue}if(!a)continue;if(s){s=0;continue}if($i=="-b"||$i=="-B"){s=1;continue}if(substr($i,1,1)=="-")continue;print $i;exit}}'); if [ -n "$TARGET" ] && [ -d "$TARGET" ]; then ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && "$ROOT/scripts/provision-worktree-env.sh" "$TARGET" || true; fi; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Provisioning env files after git worktree add...

hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$CMD" in *git*|*send-pack*|*\'*|*\"*|*\\*|*';'*|*'&'*|*'|'*|*'<'*|*'>'*|*'$'*|*'('*|*')'*|*'{'*|*'}'*|*'='*|*'`'*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; SCRIPT="$ROOT/scripts/verify_commit_command_hook.py"; EXPECTED='f5c8549116a0de826c12cfeb8e39b7a593fa333577ceb6e987e8c5ea3eeac161'; ACTUAL=$(shasum -a 256 "$SCRIPT" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}') || exit 2; if [ "$ACTUAL" != "$EXPECTED" ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: publish hook helper hash mismatch; review scripts/verify_commit_command_hook.py and update the pinned hook hash deliberately.' >&2; exit 2; fi; printf '%s' "$INPUT" | python3 "$SCRIPT"
hooks.statusMessage: Verifying types and format before push...

hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; SCRIPT="$ROOT/scripts/verify_playwright_cli_hook.py"; EXPECTED='a54cf880ea2cc095a2edf47e988153d831fb9a9e38f9d4ac4a0b0aa5c3d01318'; ACTUAL=$(shasum -a 256 "$SCRIPT" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}') || exit 2; if [ "$ACTUAL" != "$EXPECTED" ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: playwright CLI hook helper hash mismatch; review scripts/verify_playwright_cli_hook.py and update the pinned hook hash deliberately.' >&2; exit 2; fi; python3 "$SCRIPT" "$CMD"
